steps.title: Identify the key restriction signal
steps.content: The word “exclusively” reveals that the researchers focused narrowly on specific ungulates, creating a contrast with the first sentence's broad scope of “North American ungulates.”

steps.title: Apply the contrast to find the transition
steps.content:
“However” signals the unexpected narrowing from the broad scope of the first sentence to the narrow scope of the actual study.

The other three either reverse the relationship, treat the clauses as equivalent restatements, or misidentify this as providing an example rather than explaining a scope restriction.

D is correct.
